description_long: This is a single blueberry muffin with a golden-brown baked exterior and a domed top. The muffin is topped with a generous swirl of creamy white frosting, applied in a circular pattern with visible ridges. At the center of the frosting sits a single whole blueberry, adding a pop of deep blue color and a fresh accent. The muffin is encased in a plain white paper wrapper, which is slightly crinkled and translucent in places from absorbed moisture and oils. The cake itself shows hints of embedded blueberries, visible as dark spots through the wrapper and on the surface. The overall appearance is appetizing and fresh, with a homemade or bakery-style presentation.
description: A golden-brown blueberry muffin with swirled white frosting and a single blueberry on top, wrapped in a plain white paper liner. The muffin looks moist and inviting, with visible embedded blueberries.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muffin's swirled white frosting with a single blueberry centered on top and the plain white wrapper clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the muffin with a visible embedded blueberry and a partial view of the frosting swirl.
description_view_2: The frosting and blueberry topping are still visible, but the embedded blueberries in the cake are less prominent from this side.
description_view_3: The blueberry topping is clearly visible on the frosting, and the wrapper appears slightly more crinkled on this side.
attribute_frosting_style: swirled buttercream or cream cheese frosting with visible ridges
